subcodes.first_line: The Cause hath been made manifest, for the Promise hath come to pass, while the people remain in evident delusion. Among them are those who have cast aside that which is known, clinging [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر الامر اذ اتی الوعد و الناس فی وهم مبین منهم من نبذ المعلوم متمسکا
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
